_comment: Snapshot of the 'GitHub Deploy' Xcode Cloud workflow config, captured 2026-07-21. Xcode Cloud config lives entirely in App Store Connect, not in the repo -- this file plus recreate_xcode_cloud_workflow.py can recreate it via the App Store Connect API if it's ever deleted. Re-run the snapshot after any manual change in App Store Connect so this stays accurate.
name: GitHub Deploy
description: This workflow needs to exist for our GitHub workflow to be able to trigger a deploy with the API.
_comment_triggers: No automatic start conditions -- builds are triggered explicitly by .github/workflows/release-macos.yml via POST /v1/ciBuildRuns, not by Apple's native GitHub webhook (which never reliably fired for this repo). manualBranchStartCondition just controls what's selectable when starting a build manually from the App Store Connect UI.
_comment_relationships: IDs as of this snapshot -- re-fetch from the API if recreating the product/repository connection from scratch, these will change.
